name: Sernovitz, Andrew
resolved_employer: Andy Sernovitz — Austin-based CEO of GasPedal / SocialMedia.org / Board.org; NYT best-selling author of 'Word of Mouth Marketing'
evidence: Distinctive name; 'Andy Sernovitz' is a marketing author and founder of the Word of Mouth Marketing Association who runs GasPedal/SocialMedia.org/Board.org out of Austin, TX (confirmed Austin address 3616 Far West Blvd). Also an angel investor (PitchBook). Gave to Travillion.

name: Spataro, Susan
resolved_employer: Travis County Auditor (retired) — CPA/CMA who served 20+ years until 2012
evidence: Susan A. Spataro, CPA/CMA, was the long-serving Travis County Auditor (quasi-comptroller credited with the county's AAA bond rating) until her 2012 dismissal by the district judges. Local (Travillion) donation and county tie corroborate.

name: Braun, Peggy
evidence: No zip/occupation on file. Multiple people named Peggy Braun in Texas (an Austin resident age ~76, a Kerrville CPA, others); cannot confirm which one gave to Ann Howard. No FEC history.

name: Pollard, Mark
evidence: County filing self-reports occupation 'Business Owner' / employer 'Self' in Austin 78753. Could not independently confirm which specific Mark Pollard or what business online, so the nature of the business is unknown, but self-employed status is directly from the filing.

name: Sanger, Mary
resolved_employer: Environmental / land-use policy advocate (former Environmental Defense; Community Not Commodity)
evidence: Mary Sanger is a longtime Austin environmental and land-use policy advocate (associated with Environmental Defense and anti-CodeNEXT group Community Not Commodity; testified at TX Senate on the Trans-Texas Corridor). Austin 78705, prolific Democratic donor (822 FEC gifts, lean 1.0); gift to environmental commissioner Brigid Shea fits.

name: Farrell, Thomas
evidence: Austin/Westlake PO-box zip 78716; prolific Democratic donor (238 FEC gifts, lean 0.99). A prominent Thomas M. Farrell attorney exists but is Houston-based (McGuireWoods), not a confirmed match. Cannot corroborate occupation for the Austin donor.

name: Coniglio, Frank
evidence: No zip/occupation on file and no FEC history. Web search returned only a Coniglio street name in Austin, no identifiable person named Frank Coniglio. Cannot confirm.

name: Brennan, Katherine
evidence: Out-of-state donor (Saint Paul, MN 55104); Democratic-leaning (6 FEC gifts, lean 1.0). No confirmable identity or occupation linking a specific Katherine Brennan to the 2025 gift to Brigid Shea.

name: Mercer, James
evidence: No zip/occupation on file; 257+ people named James Mercer in Texas. Republican-leaning FEC history (5 gifts, lean 0.05) despite a Democratic county recipient (Travillion). Cannot confirm which individual.

name: Michael Krusee Campaign
resolved_employer: Campaign committee of Mike Krusee, former Republican Texas House member (District 52, Round Rock/Williamson Co., 1993-2009); transportation/transit champion, later a lobbyist
evidence: This is a political committee, not a person/employer, so no taxonomy industry applies. Mike Krusee was the Republican District 52 state rep known for authoring HB 3588 transportation-funding legislation and for transit advocacy; he later became a lobbyist. His leftover campaign fund made the 2017 gift to Travillion (a transit-aligned Democrat).

name: Burton, Wesley
evidence: Austin 78751; Democratic-leaning (3 FEC gifts, lean 1.0). 229+ people named Wesley Burton nationally; no confirmable occupation or identity for the specific Austin donor to Brigid Shea.

name: Aceves Communications
resolved_employer: Aceves Communications, LLC — Houston public-affairs / PR firm founded by Jaime Mercado
evidence: Aceves Communications, LLC is a Houston-based public relations / public-affairs firm (founded 2014-15 by Jaime Mercado) that runs messaging and grassroots communications campaigns for elected officials and business/civic clients. Houston 77265 address matches. Gave to Andy Brown.
